name: neruva-record
summary: Auto-record + pre-action mistake recall + code-graph/consistency pushes for Claude Code on the Neruva substrate. v0.29 adds two default-on multi-agent coordination layers: AUTO_RESOURCE_CLAIM (deterministic canonical-owner file partition so a contended agent swarm self-distributes confluently with no orchestrator; distinguishes Agent-tool sub-agents via transcript actor-identity) and AUTO_CONSENSUS (flags + localizes Byzantine contradictory value-claims). Warm Rust->Python daemon, ~50ms warm.
